overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's futuristic downtown. The player character walks from a sunlit street with curved glass architecture into a dark neon-lit underpass, then through a canyon of towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city boulevard with palm trees and curved glass architecture

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at a crosswalk
approaching the entrance to a covered underpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sunny sidewalk and crossing the street toward a dark underpass entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the street
pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: futuristic curved building with green-tinted glass panels
cylindrical structure wrapped with large digital advertisements
tall cylindrical tower with horizontal architectural rings
tropical palm tree lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bright, sunlit futuristic boulevard with curved glass architecture on the left and palm trees on the right. The camera crosses a multi-lane street at a crosswalk, approaching a dark underpass entrance while futuristic vehicles drive past.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass with neon lighting and advertisements

events.description: enters dark underpass with artificial neon lighting replacing sunlight
slight turn to the right while walking through the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking into a dark underpass with glowing neon signs and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red outfit walking ahead into the darkness

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure blocking the sky
curved green neon sign on the building facade
large red neon advertisement spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: Entering a dark concrete underpass where natural sunlight is replaced by artificial neon lighting. The camera walks beneath a massive concrete ceiling with a red neon sign visible overhead, while the bright glass buildings of the previous area fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit street canyon with towering holographic advertisements

events.description: surrounded by massive neon billboards and holographic advertisements on all sides
continues walking straight through the narrow canyon of skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow street canyon lined with massive glowing neon signs and reflective wet pavement

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying animated advertisements
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings high above the street
building covered in pink and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow urban canyon where towering buildings are covered in massive holographic advertisements and neon signage. The wet pavement reflects the colorful lights as the camera moves beneath elevated walkways and past glowing building facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with overhead monorail and massive vertical signage

events.description: looks upward at the towering skyscrapers and overhead structures
approaches crosswalk at intersection with traffic lights

agents.ego_description: approaching an intersection while looking up at the massive scale of surrounding architecture and neon signs

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: elevated train track structure crossing above the intersection
massive vertical neon sign with Japanese characters
futuristic traffic signal showing red light

segments.scene_description: Approaching a busy intersection surrounded by massive skyscrapers covered in neon signage. The camera pans upward to reveal the scale of the architecture, including overhead monorail tracks and giant vertical neon signs, while futuristic vehicles pass through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, sunlit boulevard into the dense, neon-saturated depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins by crossing a multi-lane street flanked by curved glass architecture and palm trees, moving steadily toward the mouth of a dark underpass as futuristic vehicles stream past. As the camera enters the concrete tunnel, the natural sunlight vanishes, replaced by the artificial glow of red neon signs reflecting off the heavy overhead ceiling. The scene then opens into a narrow corridor of towering skyscrapers where wet pavement mirrors a barrage of holographic advertisements and glowing facades beneath elevated walkways. Finally, the camera reaches a bustling intersection and pans upward to reveal the immense scale of the city, capturing overhead monorail tracks and giant vertical signs that loom over the passing traffic.
